error_signature: invalid input syntax for type bigint
title: Invalid input syntax for bigint in PostgreSQL
symptom: The workflow fails with an error indicating 'invalid input syntax for type bigint' when trying to insert a value into the database.
applies_when: Inserting data into a field expecting bigint
not_this_if: The error occurs in a different context
root_cause: The error occurs because the PostgreSQL database field is defined to accept only integer values (bigint), but a string value is being passed instead. This mismatch leads to the syntax error.
fix_steps: Identify the field in the database schema that is defined as bigint.
Ensure that the value being passed to this field is an integer, not a string.
Modify the workflow to convert the string to an integer if necessary.
agent_instruction: Check the data type of the session_id field and ensure you are passing an integer value.
